summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: excitement_peaks (r=-0.65), wpm (r=-0.60), geo_us_pct (r=-0.45). LASSO-stable for views_public: comment_question_rate, geo_us_pct, geo_eu_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, traffic_subscriber_pct, ms_scale_agreement. Top predictors of retention_30s: traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.58), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.53), shareability_score (r=-0.46). LASSO-stable for retention_30s: traffic_algorithmic_pct. Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: excitement_peaks (r=+0.59), ms_llm_escalation_across_loops (r=-0.49), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.29). Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: traffic_search_pct (r=+0.49), traffic_external_pct (r=+0.46), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=+0.32). LASSO-stable for engagement_comment_ratio: traffic_search_pct. Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: ms_llm_escalation_across_loops (r=-0.51), ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.42), geo_asia_pct (r=-0.29). Top predictors of outlier_potential: ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.56), loop_quality_score (r=+0.48). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: pitch_mean (r=+0.61), ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.61), loop_quality_score (r=+0.56). Top predictors of outlier_retention_score: pitch_mean (r=-0.58), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.47), geo_us_pct (r=+0.41). LASSO-stable for outlier_retention_score: geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct. Top predictors of ret_baseline: shareability_score (r=-0.57), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.48), ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.45). LASSO-stable for ret_baseline: geo_asia_pct, traffic_algorithmic_pct, peak_count. Top predictors of ret_30s: silence_ratio_audio (r=-0.55), shareability_score (r=-0.52), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=+0.51). Top predictors of ret_spike_count: ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=+0.54), ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.48), traffic_algorithmic_pct (r=-0.33). LASSO-stable for ret_spike_count: geo_asia_pct. Top predictors of ret_max_spike: genz_score (r=-0.35), ms_word_density_argmax_scale (r=+0.35), laughter_marker_count (r=-0.32).
